title: lowiorchis orchioides
intro: Lowiorchis orchioides, also known as Chinese snake root or snake root, is a type of flowering plant in the lily family. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Lowiorchis orchioides include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, it is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
